title: Debugging Cheat Sheet
scenario: Create a debugging cheat sheet for a Python program. The cheat sheet should include common debugging techniques, tools, and strategies. The output should be in the format of a Markdown list.
constraints: The cheat sheet should include at least 10 techniques
The output should be under 200 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the cheat sheet includes at least 10 techniques and is under 200 words
Check if the Markdown syntax is correct
Check if each technique is clearly described
